mapper.select: select o.outbound_id, o.outbound_date, o.outbound_request_date, o.outbound_status, o.outbound_amount, p.product_name, o.reject_reason_message from outbound_table o join product p on o.product_id = p.product_id join business_table b on b.business_id = p.business_id where b.user_id = #{userId} order by o.outbound_request_date desc

select i.inbound_id, i.inbound_date, i.inbound_request_date, i.inbound_status, i.inbound_amount, p.product_name, i.reject_reason_message from inbound_table i join product p on i.product_id = p.product_id join business_table b on b.business_id = p.business_id where b.user_id = #{userId} order by i.inbound_request_date desc
